headline: Merck: 'Strong Buy' - Terns Acquisition And Ability To Counter Keytruda Patent Loss
summary: Merck advances the KEYTRUDA family with QLEX SC formulation and combination therapies, targeting new PDUFA approvals. Read why MRK stock is still a strong buy.

headline: Does Merck’s Upgraded 2026 Outlook And New HIV Approval Reshape The Bull Case For MRK?
summary: In late April 2026, Merck reported first‑quarter results that beat expectations, slightly raised full‑year 2026 sales guidance to US$65.8–US$67.0 billion, and highlighted strong contributions from oncology, animal health and new launches. At the same time, Merck advanced its pipeline with FDA approval of the HIV regimen IDVYNSO, multiple KEYTRUDA-related priority reviews, and new renal cancer data, underscoring efforts to broaden growth drivers beyond current blockbusters. We’ll now examine...
